title: NoSQL for modern apps and AI: The future of Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable
summary: Google Cloud presented advancements in its NoSQL database services Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable for modern and AI workloads. The session covered product releases, architectural innovations, and roadmaps designed to support agentic and AI applications with high performance and scalability.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session covers advancements across three NoSQL database services: Memorystore, Firestore, and Bigtable, framed around modern and AI workloads. It walks through product releases, architectural innovations, and roadmaps aimed at supporting agentic and AI applications with high performance and scalability. The relevance lies in positioning these NoSQL offerings as infrastructure for AI agents rather than general-purpose data storage alone.
